column1: # 1. Fill in ONE row per student below
# 2. Replace ALL placeholder values (marked with <>) with real data
# 3. Save as CSV and send to Sameer for bulk import
# ─── STUDENT FIELDS (ALL REQUIRED unless marked optional) ───
# middleName       → Student's middle name             (OPTIONAL — leave blank if none)
# email            → Student email (unique)            (REQUIRED — use format: studentname@shiksha.cloud)
# phoneNumber      → Student phone / parent phone      (REQUIRED — 10 digits
# rollNumber       → Roll number in class              (REQUIRED — unique per grade)
# dateOfBirth      → Date of birth                     (REQUIRED — format: YYYY-MM-DD)
# gradeId          → Grade UUID from system            (REQUIRED — Sameer provides after creating grades)
# sectionId        → Section UUID from system          (REQUIRED — Sameer provides after creating sections)
# ─── PARENT 1 FIELDS (AT LEAST ONE PARENT REQUIRED) ───
# parent1_email        → Parent 1 email (unique)       (REQUIRED — used for login)
# parent1_whatsAppNumber → Parent 1 WhatsApp           (OPTIONAL — defaults to phoneNumber)
# parent1_isPrimary    → true / false                  (REQUIRED — mark ONE parent as true)
# parent2_firstName    → Parent 2 first name           (OPTIONAL — leave all blank if no second parent)
# parent2_email        → Parent 2 email (unique)       (OPTIONAL — must be unique if provided)
# parent2_phoneNumber  → Parent 2 phone                (OPTIONAL — 10 digits if provided)
# - Every student MUST have at least Parent 1 filled
# - parent1_email and student email MUST be unique across the entire system
# - phoneNumber is used as the INITIAL LOGIN PASSWORD for both student and parent
# - gradeId and sectionId are UUIDs — you DON'T know these yet. Sameer creates grades/sections first

column2: Sameer can map by grade name + section name during import.

column1: # gradeId and sectionId below are PLACEHOLDER UUIDs.
